forbidden_changes: do not add dense alive bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: Make terminal bonus more attainable by relaxing landing criteria (e.g., require y<0.15, low velocity, near upright, but not necessarily both legs initially)
Reduce or gate terminal_penalty to only apply on clear crash (high velocity or large angle)
Reduce magnitude of late_stability and flight_stability penalties to avoid discouraging landing attempts
Ensure early_approach and leg_bonus are preserved

intended_fix: condition reward by progress or stability stage
expected_effect: Handle stage-dependent task conflicts and discourage low-progress survival.
risk: Stage gates may be imperfect before trajectory memory is available.
